confirmed.label: Confirmed
confirmed.description: A thesis, official repository or equivalent institutional record explicitly names the supervisor.

supported.label: Supported
supported.description: An institutional profile, uploaded CV or direct public statement supports the relationship.

provisional.label: Provisional
provisional.description: Credible secondary evidence exists, but confirmation from a primary or institutional source is still required.

resolved.note: Name variants confirmed as the same person by the project owner.
Official Aston biography identifies the 1996 UMIST MSc dissertation and Philip Morgan as supervisor.

reviewedDistinct.note: The QUT thesis title page identifies P024 as Sangeetha Srinivasan; P133 is Sruthi Srinivasan at the University of Waterloo.
